## Linked issue

**Required.** This PR closes:

Closes #

> PRs without a linked, maintainer-acknowledged issue will be auto-closed
> without review. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

> ⚠️ **Library-specific changes belong in the library's own repo.** This
> meta-repo only accepts changes to `bin/`, root docs (`README.md`,
> `AGENTS.md`, `DEPLOY.md`, etc.), `.github/`, and pinned submodule SHAs.

## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Scope

- [ ] `bin/` script
- [ ] Root documentation
- [ ] `.github/` (templates / workflows)
- [ ] Pinned submodule SHA bump (which: `apron` / `bucket` / `wire` / `scaffold`)
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is linked to an open issue (`Closes #N`)
- [ ] If bumping a submodule SHA: the corresponding library release is published
      to Clojars and tagged in its own repo
- [ ] No accidental submodule SHA changes from a stray `git submodule update`
